debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)

failed_attempts:
(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simp [B, sSupIndep_pair]
      · simp [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hxy, sSupIndep_pair, Set.pair_comm]
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN'
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simp [B, sSupIndep_pair, disjoint_iff] at *
        exact sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
              simpa [hxy'] using (le_sup_left : x ≤ x ⊔ y)
            exact le_bot_iff.mp this
          exact hx this)
      · simp [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        have hxy' : x ≠ y := by
          intro h_eq
          have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
            simpa [h_eq] using (disjoint_iff.mp hxy).1
          exact hx (le_bot_iff.mp this)
        simpa [B, hxy', sSupIndep_pair]
      · subst hN
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h' : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, h', sSupIndep_pair, sup_eq_left.2 (disjoint_iff.mp hxy).1]
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, h', sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_pair, sup_eq_right.2 (le_sup_left), sup_eq_left.2 (le_sup_right)]
          using (sSupIndep_pair (by
            intro hxy'
            have : x = ⊥ := by
              apply le_antisymm
              · simpa [hxy'] using le_sup_left
              · simpa [hxy'] using le_sup_right
            exact hx this))
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton] )

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : x ≤ x ⊓ y := by simpa [hxy'] using le_inf le_rfl le_rfl
            exact le_bot_iff.mp (this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy))
          exact hx this))
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h] using sSupIndep_singleton (a := N))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_pair] using hxy.sSupIndep
      · simpa [B, h] using sSupIndep_singleton)

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          have hx' : x ≠ y := by
            intro hxy'
            have : x = ⊥ := by
              have : Disjoint x x := by simpa [hxy'] using hxy
              simpa [disjoint_self] using this
            exact hx this
          exact hx'))
      · subst hN
        simpa [B, if_neg h] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hx, hy, hxy] using (sSupIndep_pair (by simpa [hx, hy] : (x : PersistenceSubmodule M) ≠ y))
      · subst h
        simpa [B] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)) )

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · simp [B, h, sSupIndep_pair, hxy.ne_eq]
      · simp [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases hNx : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst hNx
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl, sSupIndep_pair] using (D.sSupIndep.mono (by
          intro Z hZ
          simp at hZ
          rcases hZ with rfl | rfl
          · exact (by
              have : x ≤ x ⊔ y := le_sup_left
              exact D.sSupIndep.le_of_le_sSup_of_ne (by simpa using hN) this (by
                intro hx'
                exact hx (hx'.trans (sup_eq_left.mp rfl))))
          · exact (by
              have : y ≤ x ⊔ y := le_sup_right
              exact D.sSupIndep.le_of_le_sSup_of_ne (by simpa using hN) this (by
                intro hy'
                exact hy (hy'.trans (sup_eq_right.mp rfl)))))
      · simpa [B, if_neg hNx] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N))
    )

(by
      intro N hN'
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using (sSupIndep_pair.2 (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : x ≤ x ⊓ y := by simpa [hxy', le_inf_iff] using ⟨le_rfl, le_rfl⟩
            exact le_bot_iff.mp (this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy))
          exact hx this))
      · simpa [B, if_neg h] using sSupIndep_singleton (N := N))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hxy.ne_eq] using (sSupIndep_pair (M := M) (A := x) (B := y) hxy.ne_eq).2 hxy
      · simpa [B, h])

(by
      intro N hN
      classical
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, sSupIndep_pair]
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      classical
      by_cases hNx : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst hNx
        have hxy' : x ≠ y := by
          intro h
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : Disjoint x x := by simpa [h] using hxy
            simpa [disjoint_self] using this
          exact hx this
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using (sSupIndep_pair hxy')
      · subst hNx
        simpa [B, if_neg h] using sSupIndep_singleton)

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, sSupIndep_pair, hxy.ne_eq]
      · simp [B, h])

(by
      intro N hN'
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, Set.pair_comm] using hxy.sSupIndep
      · subst h
        simpa [B, Set.singleton] )

(by
      intro N hN
      classical
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hxy.ne_eq, hxy] using (sSupIndep_pair (M := PersistenceSubmodule M) (a := x) (b := y) (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x ≤ y := by simpa [hxy'] using le_sup_left (a := x) (b := y)
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            apply le_bot_iff.mp
            exact (this.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy).trans (by simp)
          exact hx this))
      · simp [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hxy.sSupIndep]
      · simpa [B, h])

(by
      intro N hN
      classical
      by_cases h' : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, sSupIndep_pair] using (hxy.sSupIndep (s := ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))))
      · subst h'
        simpa [B] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases hNxy : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst hNxy
        simpa [B, sSupIndep_pair, hxy.ne_eq] using (sSupIndep_pair (K := PersistenceSubmodule M) (x := x) (y := y) hxy.ne_eq).2 hxy
      · subst hNxy
        simpa [B] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B]
      · simpa [B, h] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      classical
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          exact hx (hxy' ▸ (sup_eq_left.2 (le_of_eq (by rfl)))))
      · simpa [B, if_neg h] using sSupIndep_singleton (a := N))

(by
      intro N hN'
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, sSupIndep_pair, disjoint_iff, hxy.eq_bot] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          apply hx
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            simpa [hxy'] using rfl
          exact this))
      · subst h
        simp [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases hNx : N = x ⊔ y
      · simp [B, hNx, sSupIndep_pair, hxy.ne_bot hx, hxy.symm.ne_bot hy, hxy]
      · simp [B, hNx, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h' : N = x ⊔ y
      · simp [B, h', sSupIndep_pair, hxy.ne_eq]
      · simp [B, h', sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, hxy, sSupIndep_pair hx hy]
      · subst h
        simpa [B, h, sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : x ≤ x ⊓ y := by
              simpa [hxy'] using (le_inf le_rfl le_rfl)
            have : x ≤ ⊥ := this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy)
            simpa [le_bot_iff] using this
          exact hx this))
      · simpa [B, if_neg h] using (sSupIndep_singleton (a := N))
    )

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h' : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, if_pos rfl] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          have hx' : x = ⊥ := by
            simpa [hxy'] using (sup_eq_left.mp (by simpa [hxy'] using (sup_eq_left.2 le_rfl)))
          exact hx hx'))
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, if_neg h'] using (sSupIndep_singleton (N := N)))

(by
      intro N hN
      by_cases h' : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst h'
        simpa [B, h'] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro hxy'
          have : x = ⊥ := by
            have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
              simpa [hxy'] using (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy)
            simpa [le_bot_iff] using this
          exact hx this))
      · simp [B, h', sSupIndep_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN'
      by_cases hNxy : N = x ⊔ y
      · subst hNxy
        simpa [B, hxy, hx, hy] using (sSupIndep_pair (by
          intro h
          have : x ≤ y := by simpa [h] using le_sup_left (a := x) (b := y)
          exact hx (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le hxy this le_rfl))
      · subst hNxy
        simpa [B] using sSupIndep_singleton (a := N))
